transcript.detail: Read semantic spec and precedence list. Noted that cross-org ownership does not bypass cross-org boundary.
Current canAccessProject only returns true for owner edit, missing all other rules.
Added suspended check, cross-org denial, deny rules, temporary grants, owner/admin/viewer role checks.
The two test cases (owner edit allowed, non-owner edit denied) pass with new logic.
